narrative.description: Mario, Luigi, and Princess Toadstool vacation in Dinosaur Land when Bowser kidnaps the princess again. Players explore a large interconnected overworld, ride Yoshi, discover secret paths, and defeat the seven Koopalings before confronting Bowser in his castle.
narrative.core_loop: Traverse the Dinosaur Land overworld to enter levels, platform through stages using power-ups and Yoshi, find secret exits to unlock hidden areas, defeat Koopalings to open new regions, and rescue the princess.

mechanics.map_notes: Yoshi can be mounted for extended jumps, flutter kicks, tongue grabs, and color-coded swallow abilities.
mechanics.expression: Yoshi can be mounted for extended jumps, flutter kicks, tongue grabs, and color-coded swallow abilities.

mechanics.map_notes: Key-and-keyhole pairs and alternate goal posts unlock hidden paths and Star Road areas.
mechanics.expression: Key-and-keyhole pairs and alternate goal posts unlock hidden paths and Star Road areas.

mechanics.map_notes: Cape Feather enables flight and spin attack; other power-ups include Super Mushroom, Fire Flower, and Star.
mechanics.expression: Cape Feather enables flight and spin attack; other power-ups include Super Mushroom, Fire Flower, and Star.

mechanics.map_notes: Large branching overworld with multiple routes, locked paths, and switch palaces.
mechanics.expression: Large branching overworld with multiple routes, locked paths, and switch palaces.

mechanics.map_notes: Cape Feather allows sustained flight and controlled descent for secret access.
mechanics.expression: Cape Feather allows sustained flight and controlled descent for secret access.

mechanics.map_notes: Responsive Mario physics with spin jump and cape-assisted aerial control.
mechanics.expression: Responsive Mario physics with spin jump and cape-assisted aerial control.

mechanics.map_notes: Koopalings guard fortresses that unlock further overworld regions.
mechanics.expression: Koopalings guard fortresses that unlock further overworld regions.

mechanics.map_notes: Small Mario dies in one hit; powered-up forms absorb extra hits.
mechanics.expression: Small Mario dies in one hit; powered-up forms absorb extra hits.

mechanics.map_notes: Pits, lava, spikes, and autoscroll levels throughout Dinosaur Land.
mechanics.expression: Pits, lava, spikes, and autoscroll levels throughout Dinosaur Land.

mechanics.map_notes: Fire Flower grants immediate fireball attacks.
mechanics.expression: Fire Flower grants immediate fireball attacks.

mechanics.map_notes: Variable jump height for precise platforming sections.
mechanics.expression: Variable jump height for precise platforming sections.

mechanics.map_notes: Lives counter with continue on game over.
mechanics.expression: Lives counter with continue on game over.

mechanics.map_notes: Coins, dragon coins, and 1-Up mushrooms reward exploration.
mechanics.expression: Coins, dragon coins, and 1-Up mushrooms reward exploration.

mechanics.map_notes: Midway gates and ghost houses save progress within longer stages.
mechanics.expression: Midway gates and ghost houses save progress within longer stages.

mechanics.map_notes: Bowser fight uses multiple mech forms and attack phases.
mechanics.expression: Bowser fight uses multiple mech forms and attack phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Star Road, switch palaces, and hidden levels off main paths.
mechanics.expression: Star Road, switch palaces, and hidden levels off main paths.

mechanics.map_notes: Reznor, Koopalings, and Bowser follow learnable attack patterns.
mechanics.expression: Reznor, Koopalings, and Bowser follow learnable attack patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Charging enemies and boss wind-ups signal incoming attacks.
mechanics.expression: Charging enemies and boss wind-ups signal incoming attacks.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Super Mario World through its core platformer loop.
